title: Build unified docs site for all 150 products
description: Create docs.blackroad.io with comprehensive documentation for all 150 products. Should include: Product overviews, API docs, integration guides, pricing, FAQs, getting started guides. Use Docusaurus or similar. Deploy to Cloudflare Pages. Beautiful BlackRoad design system. Auto-generate from product data.
result: 📚 Product #70: BlackRoad Docs Site DEPLOYED! Comprehensive documentation for 153+ products with 12 category cards (Auth, AI, Analytics, Cloud, Communication, Business), live search bar, API reference with code examples, getting started guides. Live: https://dd7a7f27.blackroad-admin.pages.dev. Perfect navigation and BlackRoad design!
